
  <template>
    <section>
      <h1>Button</h1>
<p>To trigger an operation.</p>
<h2 id="when-to-use">When To Use</h2>
<p>A button means an operation (or a series of operations). Clicking a button will trigger corresponding business logic.</p>
<h2 id="examples">Examples</h2>
<h3 id="button-type">Button type</h3>
<demo-block>
        <div><p>There are five types of buttons: default button, home button, link button, ghost button, delicate button.</p>
</div>
        <template v-slot:source><ninecat-demo0 /></template>
        <template v-slot:highlight><pre v-pre><code class="vue">&lt;template&gt;
   &lt;n-button&gt;Default&lt;/n-button&gt;
    &lt;n-button type=&quot;primary&quot; @click=&quot;handleClick&quot;&gt;
      Primary
    &lt;/n-button&gt;
    &lt;n-button type=&quot;link&quot;&gt;
      Link
    &lt;/n-button&gt;
    &lt;n-button type=&quot;ghost&quot;&gt;
      Ghost
    &lt;/n-button&gt;
    &lt;n-button type=&quot;delicate&quot;&gt;
      Delicate
    &lt;/n-button&gt;
&lt;/template&gt;
&lt;script&gt;
export default {
  methods: {
    handleClick () {
      alert('Ninecat')
    }
  }
}
&lt;/script&gt;

</code></pre></template></demo-block><h3 id="icon-button">Icon button</h3>
<demo-block>
        <div><p>When you need to embed an Icon in a Button, you can set the icon property or use the Icon component directly in the Button.</p>
</div>
        <template v-slot:source><ninecat-demo1 /></template>
        <template v-slot:highlight><pre v-pre><code class="vue">&lt;template&gt;
   &lt;n-button icon=&quot;icon-home&quot; /&gt;
   &lt;n-button&gt;&lt;n-icon name=&quot;icon-home&quot; /&gt;&lt;/n-button&gt;
   &lt;n-button icon=&quot;icon-home&quot; type=&quot;primary&quot;/&gt;
   &lt;n-button icon=&quot;icon-home&quot; type=&quot;link&quot;/&gt;
&lt;/template&gt;
</code></pre></template></demo-block><h3 id="button-combinations">Button combinations</h3>
<demo-block>
        <div><p>You can put multiple Buttons in a n-button-group container.</p>
</div>
        <template v-slot:source><ninecat-demo2 /></template>
        <template v-slot:highlight><pre v-pre><code class="vue">&lt;template&gt;
  &lt;n-button-group&gt;
    &lt;n-button type=&quot;primary&quot;&gt;Primary 1&lt;/n-button&gt;
    &lt;n-button type=&quot;primary&quot;&gt;Primary 2&lt;/n-button&gt;
  &lt;/n-button-group&gt;
  &lt;n-button-group&gt;
    &lt;n-button&gt;Default 1&lt;/n-button&gt;
    &lt;n-button&gt;Default 2&lt;/n-button&gt;
  &lt;/n-button-group&gt;
&lt;/template&gt;
</code></pre></template></demo-block><h3 id="api">API</h3>
<table>
<thead>
<tr>
<th style="text-align:left">Property</th>
<th style="text-align:left">Description</th>
<th style="text-align:left">Type</th>
<th style="text-align:left">Default</th>
</tr>
</thead>
<tbody>
<tr>
<td style="text-align:left">type</td>
<td style="text-align:left">can be set to <code>default</code>,<code>primary</code>,<code>link</code>,<code>ghost</code>,<code>delicate</code></td>
<td style="text-align:left">String</td>
<td style="text-align:left">default</td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td style="text-align:left">icon</td>
<td style="text-align:left">Icon button, selectable just like the value of the icon</td>
<td style="text-align:left">String</td>
<td style="text-align:left"></td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td style="text-align:left">loading</td>
<td style="text-align:left">set the loading status of button</td>
<td style="text-align:left">Boolean</td>
<td style="text-align:left">false</td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td style="text-align:left">disabled</td>
<td style="text-align:left">disabled state of button</td>
<td style="text-align:left">Boolean</td>
<td style="text-align:left"></td>
</tr>
</tbody>
</table>

    </section>
  </template>
